# Story Template

**Story ID:** STORY-NNN
**Epic:** <Epic name>
**Status:** Backlog / Ready / In Progress / AI Submitted / PM Review / Done / Released
**Owner:** Solo PM
**Primary Agent:** <agent>

## User Story

As a <user>, I want <capability>, so that <benefit>.

## Context

<Background and links to PRD/UX/Architecture sections.>

## Acceptance Criteria

```gherkin
Given <context>
When <action>
Then <outcome>
```

## UX State

- Loading:
- Empty:
- Error:
- Success:

## Data / API Impact

- Models:
- API:
- Events/Telemetry:

## Privacy Impact

- Data collected:
- Data stored:
- Retention:
- Deletion:

## Test Plan

- [ ] Unit / component test:
- [ ] Integration / flow test:
- [ ] Manual verification:

## Dependencies

- <Dependency or “None”>

## Definition of Ready

- [ ] User value rõ
- [ ] Acceptance criteria rõ
- [ ] UX state đủ rõ
- [ ] Data/API impact rõ
- [ ] Privacy impact rõ nếu có audio/user data
- [ ] Test/verification rõ
- [ ] Dependencies rõ
- [ ] Fits MVP scope
- [ ] Estimate/effort đã ước lượng

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria pass
- [ ] Không phá core flow
- [ ] Loading/error/empty state phù hợp
- [ ] Verification/test pass
- [ ] Lint/typecheck/test pass nếu có
- [ ] Telemetry/event tracking cập nhật nếu cần
- [ ] Story status cập nhật
- [ ] Tech debt/risk note vào RAID nếu có
- [ ] Solo PM approve artifact contract
